title: Tenure Figma token foundation + six design artifacts shipped — AAA-clean
summary: Bootstrapped Stratum design token collections (16 colour, 8 spacing, 3 radius variables, 14 text styles) from tenure/index.html and assets/styles.css, then built all six Tenure artifacts in Figma: Brand, Agent roster, Decision class, Joiner Day 0–30, Mover internal transfer, and Leaver defensible case file. All fills and text styles are variable-bound to the token collections; no raw hex in the Figma file. Post-build AAA audit: fixed chip balloon rendering (layoutSizingVertical HUG), fixed ochre text on Ember tagline (→ ochre-link 7.14:1), and switched all DECIDE chip labels and moss section headers to ink-3-aaa (8.27:1) to meet 7:1 AAA threshold. Full text audit pass confirmed: all 118 scanned nodes meet WCAG 2.2 AAA contrast on paper and paper-warm backgrounds.

aaa_fixes: 17 nodes DECIDE chip labels + moss section headers: moss #4a5d3a (6.12:1) → ink-3-aaa #3d4456 (8.27:1)
13 chip nodes + 3 rt-stamp nodes: layoutSizingVertical FIXED → HUG (balloon fix)
meta.token_gap: moss-deep (≥7:1 on paper) — current moss #4a5d3a reaches 6.12:1. Chip borders remain moss; text was migrated to ink-3-aaa. Token request pending Chairman ratification.
